title: cyclosorus amboinensis
intro: Cyclosorus amboinensis, also known as the Amboina fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae and is native to the tropical regions of Asia and the Pacific Islands. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cyclosorus amboinensis include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and aiding in wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve steaming or infusing the leaves, which can be used as a tea or applied topically as a treatment for various ailments.
